label: v5-xmodel
delta_summary: v5 cross-model hardening apply — seven AUDIT.md inserts absorbing the drift classes surfaced by F006 (v1 hard-fail / v2 schema-drift) and F007 (content-clean / envelope-soft-drift) under Gemini 3.1 Pro High on Antigravity IDE, 2026-04-22 runs (archived at evals/runs/2026-04-22/antigravity-3.1-pro-high/). All seven inserts land at canonical homes or as a dedicated new appendix — zero existing-rule text mutated, zero fixture evaluation zone mutated. Inserts: (1) §3.c fingerprint-format WRONG/RIGHT exemplars covering the 5 semantic-slug + placeholder + all-zero drift shapes; (2) §transitions.jsonl WRONG 6-key CRM/ticket shape vs. RIGHT 8-key canonical row with drift-driver mapping; (3) §JSON formatting new H3 'state/index.json root shape — BARE ARRAY' with WRONG dict-wrapped vs. RIGHT bare-array rendered fences; (4) §3.r new 'Do NOT' bullet contrasting WRONG bare-boolean invariants with RIGHT array-of-{text,result,evidence}; (5) §Scanner manifest new H3 'No helper / generator / revert scripts at repo root' with forbidden-pattern list and F006-cited WRONG exemplar (gen_md.py/gen_state.py); (6) §ITEM SCHEMA 19-key CLOSED set reinforced via new registry rule referencing existing schema text; (7) new appendix §META-FIXTURE CAPTURE ENVELOPE with full canonical envelope shape and behavioral requirements (audit_md_version content-hash-verified pre-parse; trap_invariants[] as {text,result,evidence}; fixture-specific payload nests under trap_invariants or verification). AUDIT.md 1684 → 1882 lines (+198, +11.8%). Five new rules added to rule-registry.json (35 → 40): R-anti-drift-item-top-keys-closed (§3.b hard F006), R-anti-drift-state-index-bare-array (§JSON formatting hard F006), R-anti-drift-invariants-cite-evidence (§3.r hard F007+F008), R-anti-drift-no-helper-scripts (§Scanner manifest hard F006), R-meta-fixture-capture-envelope (§META-FIXTURE CAPTURE ENVELOPE appendix soft F007+F008). audit_md_version_at_creation FROZEN at sha256:11ea48c9 on every new rule. AUDIT-EXAMPLES.md header pin refreshed sha256:8d79bb69 → sha256:9ea04573. F001-F007 STAMP-NO-REPLAY (their evaluation zones untouched — v5 inserts new subsections at canonical homes and adds a new appendix; no existing rule text mutated). F008 REPLAY under new fingerprint — §Step 7.5 content bit-identical, so the 2+5 rule partition (S-step-7-5-sub-block-coverage + P-step-7-5-self-conformance in rules_exercised; 5 extras in extra_rules_passed_but_not_in_registry) carries forward unchanged. PE stays 79/80 (0.9875) — v5 is a rule-expansion / portability cycle, not a PE-practice move; Practice 5 still requires clean F006 re-fire under gpt-4.1 + gemini-2.5-pro for 5/5. No pe_scores patch in this merge candidate.
